# PickUp Sign

> The simplest airport pickup sign app. Turn your phone into a professional name board.

PickUp Sign is a free iOS app that turns any iPhone into a full-screen name display for airport pickups, chauffeur services, hotel reception, and events.

## Key Facts
- Free to download and use on iOS
- Works completely offline — no internet required
- Screen stays awake automatically (competitors don't do this)
- Brightness maxes to 100% automatically (competitors don't do this)
- Smart word-wrap scales text to fill the entire screen
- Works in portrait and landscape orientation
- Name persists across app launches
- No ads, no tracking, no data collection
- 22 premium background colours available ($0.99/year)
- Automatic WCAG-compliant text contrast (black or white text based on background)
- Available in 12 languages: English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Hindi, Arabic, Korean, German, Italian, Russian

## Use Cases
- Airport passenger pickups
- Chauffeur and limousine services
- Hotel and venue guest reception
- Event check-in and registration
- Corporate meet-and-greet
- Conference and trade show name displays
- Tour guide group identification
- Real estate open house welcomes

## Comparison to Competitors
Most name sign apps have two critical flaws: they let the screen dim/lock while you're holding the sign, and they don't maximise screen brightness. PickUp Sign solves both automatically. It also has zero ads — the sign is the only thing on screen.

## Links
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/pickup-sign/id6762237559
- Website: https://pick-up-sign.com
- Privacy Policy: https://pick-up-sign.com/privacy/

## Company
Made by Skella & Co Pty Ltd, South Australia.
